title: T-007 — oee_daily_summary materialized view + 15-min refresh (OEE §9.2, §9.5)
prompt:
# T-007 — oee_daily_summary materialized view

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §9.2 (`oee_daily_summary` DDL verbatim), §9.5 (refresh cron), §11 V-OEE-AGG-5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `oee_daily_summary` MATERIALIZED VIEW per PRD §9.2 verbatim (90-day rolling window, A/P/Q/OEE averages, best/worst shift correlated sub-selects against `oee_shift_metrics`). Register the every-15-min CONCURRENTLY refresh per §9.5 as a Wave1 worker job (T-111 outbox+worker primitive owns scheduling) — NOT `pg_cron`. This task only DEFINES the job; T-009 registers it.

## Pre-flight schema check
Read `packages/db/migrations/` for: latest migration number; `oee_snapshots` (08-PROD) and `oee_shift_metrics` (T-006) present.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_b_daily_summary_mv.sql`:
   - `CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW oee_daily_summary AS` (per §9.2 SELECT verbatim, 90-day WHERE filter, GROUP BY (org_id, site_id, line_id, date)).
   - Correlated sub-selects for `best_shift_id` / `worst_shift_id` against `oee_shift_metrics`.
   - `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_oee_daily_pk ON oee_daily_summary(org_id, site_id, line_id, date)`.
   - `CREATE INDEX idx_oee_daily_date ON oee_daily_summary(date DESC)`.
2. Map PRD's `tenant_id` literal in §9.2 DDL to `org_id` per Wave0 v4.3.
3. Drizzle schema `packages/db/src/schema/oee/daily-summary.ts` (read-only).
4. Vitest: (a) MV exists with §9.2 column shape, (b) CONCURRENTLY refresh succeeds, (c) RLS isolation propagates from oee_snapshots, (d) best/worst sub-selects return shift_id that maximises/minimises oee_pct in oee_shift_metrics for the (org, line, date) triple.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_b_daily_summary_mv.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/daily-summary.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/oee-b-daily-summary-mv.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when `\d+ oee_daily_summary` is read, then it is a MATERIALIZED VIEW with §9.2 column shape (A/P/Q/OEE averages, best_oee_pct, worst_oee_pct, totals, snapshot_count, best_shift_id, worst_shift_id) and idx_oee_daily_pk UNIQUE + idx_oee_daily_date indexes exist.
2. Given the UNIQUE index exists, when `REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY oee_daily_summary` runs, then it succeeds without locking readers (V-OEE-AGG-5).
3. Given two orgs and `app.set_org_context`, when SELECT FROM oee_daily_summary runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds (propagates from oee_snapshots).
4. Given seeded shift_metrics rows with known best/worst oee_pct per (org, line, date), when oee_daily_summary is refreshed and queried, then best_shift_id and worst_shift_id match expectation.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee-b-daily-summary-mv asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-b-daily-summary-mv`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not register pg_cron in this task — §9.5 lists pg_cron as illustrative; production uses Wave1 T-111 worker. T-009 owns scheduling.
- Do not refresh non-CONCURRENTLY in production (V-OEE-AGG-5).
- Do not write to oee_snapshots from 15-OEE.
- Do not name business column tenant_id; use org_id.
- Do not skip the 90-day rolling WHERE filter — uncapped scan kills performance.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create oee_daily_summary MV per §9.2 verbatim with 90-day rolling window + best/worst shift correlated sub-selects + CONCURRENTLY refresh + RLS propagation tests.

Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-b-daily-summary-mv`
